experiment.name: Trajectory Sampling - 500 Trajectories with Quality Filters
experiment.description: Load and sample 500 trajectories (400 ToolBench, 100 SWE-bench) with quality filters, domain diversity, and full provenance tracking

toolbench._note: Increased limit to 3000 to compensate for expert strict filter

swebench._note: Increased limit to compensate for quality filtering (empty content)

toolbench._note: Expert strict filter: task_success=true, Finish with give_answer, real tool output, no bad patterns

swebench._note: Relaxed for SWE-bench - some reasoning steps are short, and task_success is often null (evaluated by test pass/fail)

quality_filters._note: Filters: HTTP errors, Thought:None, empty content, missing inputs, null outcomes, missing Finish, combined errors (toolbench_19354), low grounding (GAIA), graceful failures (toolbench_87039)

deduplication._note: Expert feedback: SWE-bench has duplicate task descriptions for some PRs

step_cleaning._note: Expert feedback: 57 empty SWE-bench steps, 30 Thought:None ToolBench steps, 53 GAIA tool_execution with null tool_name

complexity._note: Distribution constrained by source data: ToolBench is mostly simple (3-4 steps), SWE-bench is all complex (7+ steps)
